title: betula pendula var. etnensis
intro: Betula pendula var. etnensis, also known as the Sicilian silver birch, is a variety of the European white birch tree, native to the island of Sicily. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Betula pendula var. etnensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea, salves, or other medicinal products.
